report_summary:
**DONE: Royce Pack Private Limited, India — Risk: 3 MONITOR — Financially stressed packaging SME; Vipin Girdhar confirmed past director with DEACTIVATED DIN 09081580; no sanctions hits on any individual including historical directors; primary concern remains financial distress (D/E 41.51, negative EBITDA)**

---

## What Changed vs. Prior Runs

This third run added **Vipin Girdhar** as a newly specified key individual and expanded the full historical director roster. Key new findings:

### Vipin Girdhar (DIN 09081580)
| Field | Finding |
|---|---|
| DIN Status | ⚠️ **DEACTIVATED** (IndiaFilings, last updated Dec 2024) |
| Appointment | 05 December 2020 |
| Cessation | Approx. 2023–2024 (before Shubham Tantia's March 2024 appointment) |
| Other companies | None — Royce Pack was his only corporate affiliation |
| PEP / SDN | CLEAR |
| Adverse media | None |
| Nature | Likely a **nominee/early-stage director** — DIN deactivation is typical for individuals who served briefly and did not maintain annual DIR-3 KYC compliance |

**Note on DIN deactivation:** In India, MCA deactivates DIins annually if the director fails to file the DIR-3 KYC form by April 30. This is a minor compliance flag, not a legal disqualification, but it's consistent with someone who is no longer actively involved in corporate governance.
